title: All Vanilla PVP
description: This pack has new Diamond looks, New nethrite looks and also some other pvp utils like short sword, no fire and more! I am working on adjusting every armour/tools.
body: New PVP looks and Essentials is a new resource pack that I am working on. It is still in pre alpha and it changes the looks of alot of the essentials for PVP and other things. It changes everything to a new look and even makes me the totem! I hope you enjoy this pack. I am working on changing all armour/Tools and pvp essentials! I hope you like my pack.
